name: Phuket-style Fluffy Omelet (inspired by Raya Restaurant)
intro: This recipe is inspired by the fl uffy, pork rind-strewn omelet served at Raya Restaurant in Phuket town,

ingredients.item: unscented cooking oil (vegetable oil is best)

method: Deep-fry Pork Rinds (for garnish, optional, recipe on page 131)
